name: blockcontact
description: Block-block contacts (the contact between two blocks, parent of subcontacts). Colour by contact-type / group / joint-set / dfn via 'colorby', mark contact points, and scale drawn contact-force vectors. For per-segment joint mechanics (state, normal/shear force) use 'subcontact'.

basic_keywords.description: Show or hide the item without removing it.
Clip the item against the global model clip box.
Set the discrete colour list used for categorical colouring.
Categorical colour entities by an attribute (group, type, state, ...). See sub-item 'colorby'.
Apply a 3D cutting plane to the item.
Configure the contour colour map (ranges, intervals, colours).
Filter which entities are drawn using range elements (see references/range-elements).
Set item transparency (0 opaque .. 100 fully transparent).

sub_items.name: colorby
sub_items.description: Categorical colour contacts by contact-type, group, joint-set, dfn, fracture.

common_usage_patterns.command: plot item create blockcontact colorby joint-set legend active on
common_usage_patterns.description: Colour block contacts by their generating joint set.

common_usage_patterns.command: plot item create blockcontact mark type scale 1.0
common_usage_patterns.description: Mark contacts and scale force markers.

notes: Probe live with 'plot item create <type> ?' to list top-level keywords, then 'plot item create <type> <kw> ?' for sub-options. Keyword sets here are binary-validated against 3DEC 9.0.
